mapper.insert: insert into articles (title, slug, summary, cover_image, content_markdown, content_html, category_id, word_count, reading_time, is_published, is_top, publish_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{slug}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{contentHtml}, #{categoryId}, #{wordCount}, #{readingTime}, #{isPublished}, #{isTop}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from articles where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_published, a.is_top, a.publish_time, a.create_time, a.update_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where match(a.title, a.summary, a.content_markdown) against(#{keyword} in boolean mode) order by a.is_top desc, a.create_time desc

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where a.is_published = 1 order by a.is_top desc, coalesce(a.publish_time, a.create_time) desc

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.content_html, a.content_markdown, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.publish_time, a.update_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where a.slug = #{slug} and a.is_published = 1

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where a.is_published = 1 and a.category_id = #{categoryId} order by a.is_top desc, coalesce(a.publish_time, a.create_time) desc
select id, title, slug, publish_day, publish_time from articles where is_published = 1 order by coalesce(publish_time, create_time) desc

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where a.is_published = 1 and (a.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.summary like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.content_markdown like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by a.is_top desc, coalesce(a.publish_time, a.create_time) desc
select title, view_count as viewCount from articles where is_published = 1 order by view_count desc limit 10

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id inner join article_tag_relations atr on a.id = atr.article_id where a.is_published = 1 and atr.tag_id = #{tagId} order by a.is_top desc, coalesce(a.publish_time, a.create_time) desc
select id, title, slug from articles where is_published = 1 and publish_time > (select publish_time from articles where id = #{id}) order by publish_time asc limit 1
select id, title, slug from articles where is_published = 1 and publish_time < (select publish_time from articles where id = #{id}) order by publish_time desc limit 1

select a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, ac.name as category_name, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.word_count, a.reading_time, a.is_top, a.publish_time from articles a left join article_categories ac on a.category_id = ac.id where a.is_published = 1 and a.id != #{articleId} and a.category_id = #{categoryId} order by a.is_top desc, coalesce(a.publish_time, a.create_time) desc limit 6
